CheckTitle: Ensure stale agent identities are disabled or removed
Description: Identifies agent identities that are still enabled (accountEnabled: true) but have not been used recently, based on creation date with no sign of active usage. These are potential targets for credential abuse.
Risk: Stale agent identities retain their permissions and credentials even when no longer in active use. An attacker who obtains stale agent credentials gains access to all resources the agent was authorized for.

Remediation.Recommendation: Disable or delete agent identities that are no longer in use. Review sign-in logs for the agent's appId to confirm inactivity before removal.

SourceNotes: Staleness detected via createdDateTime age with accountEnabled still true. Full sign-in correlation requires audit log access.
